title: Japandi Noir Living Room Ideas: Dark Minimal Decor with Black Tadelakt & Smoked Oak (2025 Trend)
description: Discover Japandi Noir: a serene, moody living room with matte black tadelakt walls, smoked oak slats, a charcoal linen sectional, and a monolithic black stone coffee table. Warm gray microcement floors, frosted shoji screens, a single bonsai, and soft skylight glow deliver calm, textural minimalism. Save for dark interior design ideas, modern wabi-sabi styling, and Scandinavian–Japanese living room inspiration.
